title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda determines not to become a mentally consumed full-time mother. Meanwhile, Charlotte blurts out her belief in the theory that everyone receives only two great loves.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Samantha gives Richard another chance after his unfaithfulness. Meanwhile, although Miranda is an atheist, she cannot deny Steve's entire Catholic family the opportunity to have the baby baptised.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard's confidence wavers when Laurie and Monica force him to work with Eklow, a new artificial-intelligence company. Meanwhile, Gavin questions his future beyond Hooli.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard decides to help Laurie when she is in trouble, but his lack of emotional discipline threatens to backfire on Pied Piper. Meanwhile, Gavin tries to make a deal with a stubborn partner.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: As Pied Piper prepares to close on their Series B funding, Richard receives some unsettling news. Meanwhile, Gilfoyle suggests a proposition and Monica is blunt with Richard.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: PiperNet launches but an early success makes Monica suspicious. Meanwhile, Richard makes a surprising move and the team races against the clock as its future is threatened.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard discovers his promise that Pied Piper will not collect user data is under threat. Meanwhile, Jared longs for the past and Gilfoyle gets creative in dealing with Dinesh.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard meets a potential investor, while Gilfoyle clashes with Human Resources. Furthermore, Gavin explores a leaner Hooli's future.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The Pied Piper team races to close a major deal. Meanwhile, Dinesh considers being a better person and an angry Jared reluctantly helps Richard.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard's authority is threatened by his former Hooli manager. Meanwhile, Monica tries to prove her support of other women and Gavin sets his sights on the literary world.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard fumes at Gavin's new ethical stance. Furthermore, Dinesh's trip turns into a nightmare, while Gilfoyle and Monica work on their peer review scores.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: A major event puts PiperNet's capabilities to the test. Meanwhile, Monica confronts Jian-Yang over his use of Pied Piper's name.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie's plans to spend Saturday night with Mark are wrecked when reshoots for 'Seeing Red' are relocated to the middle of the desert.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: "Seeing Red" is finally on the air and Valerie is exposed to a variety of critical thoughts. Far more critical than the ladies of "The Talk", or a pressroom of media bloggers, is husband Mark. On a surprise trip to Mickey's apartment, Valerie gets a surprise herself.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon organises the North's defenses, while Cersei tries to even the odds. Later, Daenerys comes home and the Night King makes his way south.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Daenerys receives an unexpected visitor, Jon faces resistance and Tyrion plans the conquest of Westeros. Meanwhile, Cersei gathers her allies and Arya has a reunion with old friends.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie feels bored, as if New York lacks entertainment and insists on celebrating Charlotte's birthday together. Meanwhile, Samantha promises Richard she will accompany him to Atlantic City.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: When Carrie sees the cover her publishers plan for her column book, she turns to Samantha, who agrees to handle her public relations for a minimal fee.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: In the lead up to Emmy night, Valerie attends Juna's annual party, where she receives an unexpected proposal. Meanwhile, she must deal with a crisis at home and a massive bombshell.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Holmes and Watson investigate the murder of a hedge fund manager who was running a Ponzi scheme; Sherlock considers sponsoring a fellow addict.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon and Daenerys finally meet and Cersei gains a new ally. Later, Sansa receives an unexpected visitor, while Sam is confronted for his actions.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Daenerys takes matters into her own hands. Later, Arya reaches her destination, while Jaime and Bronn collect the spoils from the war with the Tyrells.

subTitle: Richard has trouble getting Pied Piper ready in time for the TechCrunch Disrupt. Meanwhile, Erlich realises he slept with the wife of one of the judges of the contest.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard, a computer programmer, must choose between a deal with Gavin Belson and Peter Gregory. Similarly, both want his cooperation to make his super-compressing algorithm change the world.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard hires Jared to design a business plan. Meanwhile, Big Head is asked to work for Gavin Belson, where he discovers that Hooli has stolen the Pied Piper algorithm and rebranded it as Nucleus.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The partners run into trouble with their company name when they discover it is already taken. Subsequently, Erlich searches for a new name in another dimension of his consciousness.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard drunkenly promises to make Erlich a board member, a decision he regrets the next morning. Meanwhile, Big Head finds others at Hooli who, like him, have made careers out of doing nothing.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Since Pied Piper is the official company name, Erlich wants a logotype and hires an artist for the job. Meanwhile, Richard faces a tighter deadline for the project after a mistake.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard discovers a problem in the code writing and hires Kevin to write the code for him.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Samantha supervises Anthony during the preparations for Carrie's book presentation party. Later, at her publisher's office, she meets another author, Jack Berger.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda feels like a double failure as neither motherhood nor professional life receives her full attention. Meanwhile, Samantha considers her own problems equally important.

title: The Odd Couple
subTitle: After both of their marriages fail, Oscar Madison and his uptight, former college roommate, Felix Unger, decide to live together.

title: The Odd Couple
subTitle: Felix tries to help when Oscar is hired to ghostwrite a retired baseball player's autobiography, but he ends up making the task more difficult.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Moriarty (Natalie Dormer) is brought in as a consultant on a kidnapping case that Watson and Holmes are investigating; Detective Bell struggles on the path to recovery.

subTitle: Daenerys demands loyalty from the surviving Lannister soldiers. Meanwhile, Jon heeds Bran's warning about White Walkers on the move.

subTitle: Jon goes beyond the wall to capture a wight, while Daenerys makes a tough decision.

subTitle: Monica painfully struggles to deal with her new boss. Meanwhile, Richard makes an important decision about the company's future.

subTitle: Richard desperately struggles to find a backer as they face legal and financial woes. Meanwhile, an old enemy visits Richard.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: While considering Gavin's proposal, Richard is approached by Russ Hanneman, an image-conscious billionaire who wants to back Pied Piper. Gilfoyle and Dinesh play hardball to get what they want. Gavin finds a new strategy in dealing with the enemy.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard and Erlich disagree over a potential employee. Dinesh and Gilfoyle worry that someone they recommended for the company will be receiving more money than they make.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Capitalising on a romance-related bet with E and Vince on who can score with the ladies first, Drama takes Turtle under his wing to Craigslist, the one place where love knows no boundaries.

title: Entourage
subTitle: E gets a new office and tries to announce his position as Vince's manager. Meanwhile, Vince and Turtle fight with Gary Busey over an antique desk with a rich Hollywood history.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon is brought before Mance Rayder, while the Night's Watch survivors retreat south. In King's Landing, Tyrion asks for his reward and Littlefinger offers Sansa a way out.

subTitle: Sherlock Holmes pairs with Watson, a former surgeon tasked with keeping the detective sober. The unlikely duo must bridge their differences to solve the mysterious death of a doctor’s wife.

subTitle: Stanford introduces Carrie to his friend and best client, Derek. Later, he requests to stay the night with her and exhibits more shyness and loneliness than mortals who crave models.

subTitle: Carrie receives an invitation to stay with a married friend and her husband, Peter, at their beach house. However, her trip ends abruptly when she encounters Peter naked in the kitchen.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie and Mr Big encounter each other repeatedly until they arrange a date at Samantha's new restaurant public relations launch, but he cancels at the last moment.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Eric gets into a car accident with Anna Faris. However, after she gives him his number so he could call for her insurance, he tries to contact her, but finds out she gave him a wrong number.

title: Entourage
subTitle: Vince determines whether or not he wants to do Billy Walsh's next project as a personal favor. Meanwhile, E takes on Anna Faris as a new client.

title: Elementary
subTitle: When a man is shot and killed while entering his apartment, Sherlock investigates; Watson goes to dinner with her ex-boyfriend.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Arya, Gendry and Hot Pie meet the Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Jaime travels through the wilderness with Brienne and Sansa confesses her true feelings about Joffery to Margaery.

title: The Gilded Age
subTitle: Bertha deals with unwanted rumors in the press... and the sudden arrival of her sister Monica.
